headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New England Patriots updates, intel, buzz

headline: Patriots lack depth at linebacker after Marte Mapu trade
description: Mapu was selected in the third round of the 2023 NFL draft -- one of Belichick's outside-the-box picks.

headline: Why Fernando Mendoza isn't attending the draft
description: Adam Schefter joins Pat McAfee and reports on why Fernando Mendoza won't be attending the NFL draft in Pittsburgh.

headline: Sources: Fernando Mendoza not planning to attend NFL draft
description: Fernando Mendoza has informed the NFL that he is not planning to attend the draft, sources told ESPN.

headline: Why Schrager has 'most polarizing prospect' going to Chiefs in his mock draft

headline: Room for two RBs? How Saints roster looks ahead of NFL draft
